title: Press Reset
creator: Jason Schreier
description: A reported history of studio closures, layoffs, acquisitions, and unstable careers in the game industry. Interviews follow developers through the consequences and attempts to build different kinds of workplaces.
useful: It adds labor conditions and institutional instability to production study, subjects that postmortems often omit.
audience: Developers, producers, students, and readers considering games as both creative work and an industry.
learning: Identify structural causes of studio instability
Understand how closures affect individual careers
Compare alternative approaches to organizing game work
